title: Non Slip Bath Mat - Extra Long Non-Slip Anti Mould Shower Mat - Machine Washable Anti Slip Bathroom Floor Mats with Strong Rubber Suction Cup Grip - Blue 100 x 40 x 0.5 cm
features: DURABLE BATH MAT: Our bathroom mats, complete with over 200 suction cups are the ideal non slip and anti mould bathmat that you’re missing to create a completely safe and non-slip bath. Our non slip bath mats are the most durable bath mats in the market.
EASY TO USE: Experience hassle-free setup - simply place the bath mat on a clean, dry surface for instant slip resistance. No complicated installation or adhesives required.

IDEAL DESIGN AND SIZE: One large bath mat size (100 x 40 x 0.5 cm), our long and narrow non slip shower mat is a perfect fit for all types of baths. Made of white PVC material, our design gives a contemporary look to any bath it's placed in.

MULTI PURPOSE: We have designed our unique non-slip bath mat with children and elderly in mind, however, we've also found it useful for pets. Our multipurpose bathmats cover a wide range of uses, ideal for hotels and hospitality to modern bathrooms.

COMFORTABLE TEXTURE FOR A LUXURIOUS FEEL: Enjoy a spa-like experience with the cushioned, comfortable texture of our bath mat. Its soft yet sturdy surface adds a touch of luxury to your daily routine.
description: Product Description What is a non-slip bath mat with suction cups? A non-slip bath mat with suction cups is designed to provide a secure grip on smooth surfaces like bathtubs or shower floors. Are these bath mats safe for all surfaces? These mats work best on smooth, non-textured surfaces like porcelain, acrylic, or tiled bathtubs and shower floors. They are not suitable for uneven or textured surfaces where suction cups may not fully adhere. Is the bath mat easy to clean? Yes, the bath mat is easy to clean. Simply rinse it with water after each use and hang it to dry. For deeper cleaning, hand wash it with mild soap and water, then air dry. Is the mat safe for kids and seniors? Absolutely! These mats are designed to enhance bathroom safety for people of all ages, including kids and seniors. The non-slip surface and suction cups provide a stable and secure footing. What material is the bath mat made of? Our bath mats are made from high-quality, BPA-free, and non-toxic PVC or TPE materials, ensuring durability, safety, and comfort.
